title: DMZLayers+
description: DMZLayers+ expands DragonMineZ race customization by allowing up to 12 skin layers, including the default DMZ layers and 6 additional custom colors.
body:
![DMZLayers+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df17f03fbfebf23576de0d2d21db8d1625fdd267.png)

**DMZLayers+** is an addon for Dragon Mine Z that expands the race customization system by allowing additional skin layers and custom color slots.

This addon is designed for **modpack creators, addon developers, and server owners** who want more flexibility when creating custom races.

***

## ✨ Features

*   Supports **up to 12 skin layers**
*   Compatible with the **6 default Dragon Mine Z layers**
*   Adds **6 additional custom color slots**
*   Enables **more detailed and complex race designs**
*   Designed to integrate naturally with Dragon Mine Z

***

## 🧩 Default Dragon Mine Z Layers

DMZLayers+ fully supports the original layers used by Dragon Mine Z:

*   BodyType1
*   BodyType2
*   BodyType3
*   HairColor
*   Eye1Color
*   Eye2Color

***

## 🎨 Additional Custom Colors

This addon introduces **six additional color layers** that can be used for new race designs:

*   CustomColor1
*   CustomColor2
*   CustomColor3
*   CustomColor4
*   CustomColor5
*   CustomColor6

These layers can be used to create:

*   unique skin patterns
*   race markings
*   armor-like body parts
*   extra shading
*   special visual traits

***

## 💡 Why DMZLayers+

While Dragon Mine Z already allows race customization, the number of available layers can limit more complex designs.

**DMZLayers+ extends this system**, allowing creators to design **more unique and visually detailed races** without replacing the original Dragon Mine Z mechanics.

***

## ⚙️ Use Cases

Perfect for:

*   custom race addons
*   Dragon Ball inspired races
*   modpack race systems
*   server-exclusive races

***

## 📦 Requirements

*   Dragon Mine Z 2.0.3+
*   Minecraft 1.20.1

***

## 🔧 Compatibility

DMZLayers+ does **not replace Dragon Mine Z systems**.

It simply **extends the existing layer system** to allow more customization and flexibility for addon developers.
